2605.04410.title: Evaluation Cards for XAI Metrics
2605.04410.paper_summary: The evaluation of explainable AI (XAI) methods is affected by a lack of standardization. Metrics are inconsistently defined, incompletely reported, and rarely validated against common baselines. In this paper, we identify transparency of evaluation reporting as a central, under-addressed problem. We propose the XAI Evaluation Card, a documentation template analogous to model cards, designed to accompany any study that introduces an XAI evaluation metric. The card covers explicit declaration of target properties, grounding levels, metric assumptions, validation evidence, gaming risks, and known failure cases. We argue that adopting this template as a community norm would reduce evaluation fragmentation, support meta-analysis, and improve accountability in XAI research.
2605.04410.paper_summary_zh: 可解釋人工智慧（XAI）方法的評估受到缺乏標準化的影響。<lb/>指標的定義不一致，報告不完整，且很少與常見基準進行驗證。<lb/>在本文中，我們將評估報告的透明度確定為一個中心且未充分處理的問題。<lb/>我們提出了 XAI 評估卡，這是一個類似於模型卡的文檔模板，旨在伴隨任何引入 XAI 評估指標的研究。<lb/>該卡涵蓋了目標屬性的明確聲明、基礎層級、指標假設、驗證證據、遊戲風險和已知失敗案例。<lb/>我們認為，將這一模板作為社區規範的採用將減少評估碎片化，支持元分析，並提高 XAI 研究的問責性。
2605.04410.author: Rokas Gipiškis et.al.
